creator: miff@spam.frisbee.net.au
text:
When invoked with the '-p' option, fsck will exit with an error
	status if a ufs filesystem with the 'noauto' attribute is
	not currently available.
	The 'noauto' attribute is useful for fstab entries for 
	removal disks which may not be online at boot time.

Fix: 

Additional test(s) in fsck internals.  If nobody else has looked
	at this before, I guess I'll have to 8)
